description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, reducing ATK by [15%->10%] for [10 sec->5 sec] and increasing M.DMG taken by 25%. [Overcharge]: Deals an additional ??? M.DMG, and additionally increases the ATK reduction by [15%->10%] and the M.DMG taken increase by 25%.

Removes all negative effects from all allies, restores ??? HP 10 times, and increases Status Resistance by [250->300]. [Overcharge]: Additionally increases all allies’ Crit Chance by 250, DMG dealt to non-Hero enemies by [10%->12%], and Status Resistance by [250->300].

Detonates an energy orb on a random enemy and nearby enemies, dealing ??? M.DMG. [Overcharge]: Deals an additional ??? M.DMG, increases M.DMG taken by [25%->10%] for 10sec, and stuns for [5 sec->3sec].

Gains 1 [Charge] every 0.5sec, and gains 10 [Charge] whenever [1 orb of Mana->1000 Mana] is consumed. When [Charge] reaches 100 stacks, enters [Overcharge] for 15sec, empowering Skills. [Overcharge]: Increases ATK by ??? + 5% of Annette’s ATK, and on Normal Attack, reduces cooldown of all Skills by [10%->5%]. This effect cannot be dispelled, and [Charge] cannot be gained while [Overcharge] is active.

light.unified: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100% [(removed) Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec].

dark.unified: Upon use, the amount of [Charge] gained is increased by 40% [(removed) Target takes 25% increased M.DMG].

light.unified: [Overcharge] Attack increase amount is increased by 100% [(removed) Applies the ATK Boost effect to all allies].

description.unified: [Ray of Annihilation] For 10 sec, reduces the target's Crit Chance by [250->150] and Mana by {0}.
[Emergency Treatment] Reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000] and increases Heal Rate by {0}%.
[Process of Elimination] Increases DMG by {0}%, and on attack, gains 2 additional Charge stacks. These stacks can also be gained during Overcharge.
[Charge] At the start of battle, gains {0} Charge Stacks, and while in Overcharge, increases Cooldown Reduction from Normal Attacks by [5%->10%].

Every {0}sec, gains 1, Charge(s) and recovers 1% Mana. This Charge can be gained even while Overcharge is active. During [Overcharge], all allies' damage dealt to bosses increases by {1}%, and damage taken is reduced by {2}%.

Summons the soul of Crystallized Technomagic, Rascal for 15sec, recovering [300->225] Mana for all allies every sec, and enters the [Overcharge] state. During the duration, increases M.DMG all enemies take by [30%->6%], and against Bosses, the effect is changed to 60%.

1.from: Increases all allies' ATK by 30% and Crit DMG by 50% for the duration of Skill.
1.to: For the duration, increases ATK of all allies by 11%.
1.unified: For the duration, increases ATK of all allies by [30%->11%] [(removed) Crit DMG by 50%].

2.from: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 5 sec. Additionally, reduces all allies' Cooldown of all Skills by 0.5 sec every sec.
2.to: Every sec, reduces cooldown of all allies’ skills by 0.125 sec.
2.unified: Every sec, reduces cooldown of all allies’ skills by [0.5 sec->0.125 sec] [(removed) Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 5 sec].
